name: oidc-global-scopes
summary: Global OIDC scope and claim definitions for all relying parties
description: Allows defining extra claims on existing scopes (e.g. add 'department' to 'profile') or entirely new scopes with associated claims, applied globally to all OIDC relying parties without per-RP configuration. Supports a fallback claim-to-session-attribute mapping so global scope claims work even when the RP has not declared them in its Exported Attributes.
author: LemonLDAP::NG team <lemonldap-ng@ow2.org>
